classification.rationale: Single imperative label. Too short to read inner attitude, stress, or motor. No force/exertion evidence, no flow, no spatial scan — just a bare functional directive. Cannot pin a tempo.

Three-word imperative prompt. Slightly softer than 'Enter' (invitational 'Choose') but still too short to establish inner attitude, stress, or motor. No weight, flow, or temporal evidence.
Possessive field label only. No verb, no register, no movement evidence. Cannot derive placement from a two-word nominal.

Three-word CTA. 'Create' implies initiation and mild forward-pull (vision-adjacent), but no stress, flow, weight, or spatial evidence is present to anchor a tempo. Too short for reliable classification.
Single progressive-tense loading word with ellipsis. Implies process-in-motion (Time stress possible), but one word is insufficient to establish inner attitude or motor.

text: By continuing, you agree with Infinex

classification.rationale: A legal-boilerplate consent clause. It is unhedged and categorical ('by continuing, you agree') — Direct/Space. No force or exertion against resistance: Weight test fails, so no Strong tempo. Light+Direct+Sustained reads as Self-Contained (Stable family, Light). The prose orients the user spatially toward a structural fact (terms binding). Aspect is penetrating (Space-led, cuts to the structural implication). Motor: gliding (Light/Direct/Sustained) with a dabbing quality (brief, precise). Pole: direct.

text: Some early Infinex users may have signed up with a passkey that requires their username to log in. If you're having trouble logging in, enter your Infinex username and try again.

classification.rationale: A diagnostic helper text: it identifies a specific sub-population ('some early users'), names the cause, and gives a clear remediation path ('enter your username and try again'). The register is Awake — spatial orientation, alert noticing of a structural snag, unhedged but not forceful. No weight-bearing pressure; the copy simply places the reader correctly. Certain (Awake, Light/Direct/Sustained) fits: settled, factual, orienting. Motor: Gliding → Dabbing (light, direct, minimal effort).

Two-word CTA label. Purely functional, direct, economical. No inner attitude discernible at this length. Space-led (Direct), Light. Motor: Dabbing — precise, quick, light touch. Too short to pin any tempo.
A single conjunction used as a UI separator. No movement quality readable; entirely structural/syntactic. Cannot assign any placement.

A short greeting phrase. The warmth implied is relational/Near-adjacent, Flow-tinged (free, welcoming continuity), but at two words there is insufficient material to pin a tempo. Three-word navigational option. Direct, functional, space-oriented. No inner attitude depth at this length. Light motor (Dabbing) — precise, minimal. Too short for a tempo read.

classification.rationale: 'Nice one!' is a brief affirmative exclamation — light, buoyant, socially outward. It carries no weight-bearing force (Weight test: no exertion, no resistance). The exclamative burst is Flow-free, radiating outward to the user. Mobile family fits: it's a momentary acknowledgment flash, fragmenting briefly into social reward. 'Acknowledged' (Mobile — seen/noticed) is the closest tempo: the system briefly marks the user's action as seen. Motor: light — Floating→Flicking (buoyant, quick outward flick).

'Name your seed phrase.' is a clean, unhedged directive — Direct, orienting, no urgency pressure, no emotional warmth, no force against resistance. Reads Awake (Space+Time): the user is pointed to a specific structural task. Penetrating aspect (Space-led: it targets an exact object — the seed phrase). Pole: Direct. Weight test: no muscular force, no accumulation against resistance — this is a light orienting touch, Gliding→Dabbing motor. Tempo: Certain (Awake, weightless declarative directive).

text: Give your seed phrase a name…

A bare three-word imperative UI label. No prose texture, no emotional or kinetic charge beyond the functional directive. Too short to read inner attitude or tempo.

text: Give your imported wallet a name to use it.

classification.rationale: Slightly more textured than IU032: 'Give your imported wallet a name to use it.' The conditional clause ('to use it') orients the user spatially — it maps cause-to-effect with a clean, unhedged directness. No weight-bearing force or emotional charge. Reads Awake/Certain: alert, settled, direct orientation. Space-led penetrating aspect. Weight test: no force/exertion — this is Light. Motor: gliding (sustained orientation) → dabbing (quick, precise action prompt). Pole: direct.

'Non-custodial, cross-chain, easy recovery' — three parallel declarative attributes, no verbs, no hedging, no urgency. Reads as a settled self-definition, mapping structural coordinates. Space-led: it orients the reader by naming what the thing IS across multiple dimensions. Stable family, Light-end: Self-Contained (Stable Light+Direct, p. 497) rather than Commanding because there is no weight-bearing force — it simply names facts. Penetrating aspect (Space-led). Motor: gliding → dabbing (light, direct, matter-of-fact). Weight test: no exertion/pressure — purely categorical naming.
A two-word UI header label. No prose content beyond naming an event type. Genuinely too short to read any inner attitude or tempo.
A two-word UI header label naming an event type. Too short for any movement-quality or tempo reading.

A two-word proper-noun label ('Infinex wallet'). Pure naming — no qualitative prose to read movement quality or tempo from. Too short.

Two-word UI label. Functional nomenclature — orients the reader to a structural datum (cost of the network). Too short to read a full inner attitude. The spatial-orienting function nudges toward Awake/Direct, but no stress, motor, or tempo can be reliably extracted from a bare label.

Two-word UI label flagging an unrecognised asset. Purely functional; carries an implicit alerting function but the sample is far too sparse to extract a placement. No force, no flow, no orientation pattern — genuinely illegible at this length.

Three-word UI label. 'Estimated' introduces hedging (tentative/qualified), which could nudge toward Doubting (Awake) or Uncertain (Awake), but the sample is too short to commit. Structurally orienting but no inner attitude is securely readable at this length.
Section-header label. Classifying/enumerating two structural categories — spatially organisational, cataloguing. Nudges toward Direct/Structural (Awake or Stable) but too sparse for a tempo read.
Two-word UI label naming a functional sub-entity. Purely nominal; no drive, no motor, no aspect is extractable. Too short.
Single-word tag/badge. 'Sponsored' conveys that a cost is covered externally — functional informational marker. No attitude, no motor readable from one word.

Single imperative CTA. 'Approve' is a clean, unhedged, categorical directive — Direct (Space), decisive, no weight-bearing force evident. Aspect penetrating (Space-led decisive cut). Motor: gliding (sustained prep) → dabbing (light/direct/quick execution).

In-progress state label with ellipsis. The '…' signals ongoing, unresolved duration — Time-stressed, Sustained (process not yet complete, reader held in suspension). No weight-bearing force; light, continuous. Reads as Awake 'Uncertain' (the waiting, unresolved pole of Awake — Space+Time, Sustained/unresolved). Circumscribing aspect (Time-led, process-wrapping). Motor: gliding (sustained/light/direct) → floating (light/flexible/sustained — open, unresolved drift while the operation completes).

Single imperative CTA — categorical refusal/termination. 'Reject' is Direct, unhedged, final. Weight test: no force/exertion against resistance — it is a clean stopping-action, not a push. Primary read: Awake 'Certain' (Direct/Light), penetrating aspect. However the word carries a curt, carved-off quality — an Unsociable flash (Remote family, Space+Flow, the 'withdrawn refusal' tempo) surfaces as a transient outer-action moment, analogous to Example 5's 'Unsociable beat'. Single imperative CTA. 'Proceed' is directional and forward-oriented — Space-led, unhedged, no weight-bearing pressure. Weight test fails (no force/exertion). Reads as Awake 'Certain': a clean go-ahead, declarative and direct. Slightly more forward-moving than 'Approve' but same inner structure. Penetrating aspect (Space-led, oriented continuation). Motor: gliding → dabbing (light/direct/sustained prep into quick execution).
Single imperative verb. Too short to read any inner attitude, stress, or motor. Could hint at Direct/Quick (Dab) but one word is genuinely unreadable.
Two-word imperative label. Too short to read a tempo. A functional CTA with no weight, flow, or space information beyond its directness.
Single portmanteau verb (swap+bridge). Too short to read. Carries a light/flexible flavour (Flicking/Dabbing direction) by its coinedness but genuinely unreadable at one word.

A loading-state label: process is underway, outcome not yet resolved. The ellipsis ('…') marks sustained open-endedness rather than urgency — time-stress, but the pole is sustained (waiting, not hurrying). Awake family: the UI is actively scanning/orienting ('Loading…details') without Weight evidence. 'Uncertain' fits: attention is oriented but resolution is pending. Circumscribing aspect because the label encircles an ongoing time-bound action. Light motor (gliding→floating) — no force, just smooth process-tracking.

Short declarative past-tense confirmation. Unhedged, categorical, final — the canonical Direct/Weightless read (Awake 'Certain'). No force or exertion evidence; just a clean settled notice of completion. Penetrating aspect (Space-led: pins exactly what happened). Light motor (gliding→dabbing): precise, clean, no muscular load.

Progressive-tense status label ('Sending…') with ellipsis: process ongoing, outcome pending. Time-stress (the clock is running) with a sustained pole (still in motion, not resolved). Awake family — orienting the user to a live event. 'Uncertain' because completion is not yet confirmed. No Weight evidence. Circumscribing aspect (Time-led framing of an action in progress). Light motor (gliding→floating).

Past-tense completion confirmation, unhedged and categorical. Parallel to 'Message signed.' — the same Awake 'Certain' read: declarative, settled, Direct, Weightless. Penetrating aspect (Space-led: precisely orients the user to what has been done). Light motor (gliding→dabbing). No force or exertion against resistance.

System confirmation of a completed switch: 'Switched to {chainName}'. Unhedged, past-tense, direct statement of the new state. Awake 'Certain' — orients the user spatially/structurally to the new context. No Weight evidence; brevity is Quick/Direct (Dab), not Strong. Penetrating aspect (Space-led orientation). Light motor.

Functional section-header label ('Manage asset visibility'). Administrative, self-contained governance of one's own domain — no urgency, no emotion, no weight-bearing pressure. Stable 'Self-Contained' (Light+Direct) fits: calm structural ownership. Penetrating aspect (Space-led: directly names the management function). Light motor. Search-field placeholder: 'Search asset name or ticker'. Invites flexible scanning across multiple possible inputs ('name or ticker' — two pathways). Awake 'Acute' fits: alert, sensor-oriented, ready to attend to whatever signal arrives. Penetrating aspect (Space-led — the function is pure spatial orientation). Pole is flexible (the 'or' opens multiple scan paths rather than pinning a single direct target). Light motor (gliding→floating — open, scanning, no weight).

text: No assets found. Try a new search.

'No assets found' is a clean declarative placement (Awake/Certain), light-touch. 'Try a new search' redirects attention spatially. Weight test fails: no force or exertion. The curtness flashes a brief Unsociable (Remote) outer beat — carved-off, closed door.

text: You don't have any assets yet

Motor: gliding (Light/Direct/Sustained) is apt for a smooth, low-key informational delivery.
Two-word label. Too short to read inner attitude, stress, or aspect. Insufficient prose to classify.

An inviting, open prompt — relational, body-forward, reaching toward the user with gentle curiosity. The ellipsis softens finality and signals open flow. A compact technical specification — no warmth, no force, pure spatial orientation. 'Images and videos, max 25MB each' orients the user with Direct spatial precision. Awake/Certain: alert, settled, factual constraint. Weight test: no exertion. Light touch, direct placing.

A single in-progress state label — Time-dominated, Quick, Mobile. The ellipsis signals active, ongoing, time-bound process. Mobile (Time+Flow) with circumscribing aspect (Time-led). 'Acknowledged' fits: the system is mid-act, visible in its doing, fragmenting forward. Weight test: no force. Light motor (dabbing/flicking) suits the fleeting in-progress nature.

A short, warm, exclamatory acknowledgment — relational, body-forward gratitude. 'Thanks for your feedback!' carries genuine warmth and human connection without force. The exclamation mark adds free-flow energy rather than Strong-Weight push.

classification.rationale: A calm, orienting factual statement — tells the user exactly where and when something will appear. No hedging, no urgency, no weight-bearing pressure. Three-word empty-state label. Identical register problem to IU071 — too short to read inner attitude. Direct and settled, but no basis for tempo assignment beyond that.

classification.rationale: Instructional micro-copy offering two direct structural alternatives: search by name OR enter a wallet address. Space-led orientation — it scans two paths and presents them. No weight-bearing pressure, no urgency clock, no flow-yielding. Awake 'Certain' fits: Light+Direct, unhedged, factual guidance. Motor: gliding (sustained path-laying) → dabbing (quick, precise touch for either option).

text: You don't have any entities yet.

classification.rationale: A quiet, settled empty-state notice: 'You don't have any entities yet.' The 'yet' introduces a mild temporal held-ness — sustained, not urgent. Stable Light+Direct: no weight-bearing force, no hedging, just a contained factual acknowledgment. Self-Contained (Stable family) fits the calm, inward, non-pressuring tone. text: Only native BTC is supported. Other Bitcoin assets won't be withdrawable until support is added.

classification.rationale: Two-part structure: first sentence states a constraint categorically ('Only native BTC is supported'); second sentence softens it with a temporal hedge ('until support is added'). The dominant read is Space-led orientation — direct structural scoping of what is and isn't possible. No independent force/exertion evidence; the categorical tone is Direct (Space), not Strong (Weight). Awake 'Certain' carries the primary register. Transient 'Unsociable' moment: the blunt boundary-setting ('Other Bitcoin assets won't be withdrawable') flashes a Remote-family carved-off beat, as in Example 5. Motor: gliding (sustained, orienting) → dabbing (precise, Light+Direct+Quick).

Four-word imperative CTA: 'Deposit to get started.' Light, brisk, invitational — no weight-bearing pressure, just a quick directional nudge. Time-led (there is a 'to get started' forward pull), Quick pole. Mobile 'Acknowledged' fits: a small, flickering beckoning gesture that names the next step without heaviness. Motor: dabbing (Light+Direct+Quick) → flicking (Light+Flexible+Quick), both light-weight. No force against resistance — Weight test fails for any Strong tempo.

text: Use this address to deposit supported tokens and collectibles on {chainName}

classification.rationale: Instructional orientating copy: 'Use this address to deposit supported tokens and collectibles on {chainName}.' Direct spatial mapping — here is the address, here is its purpose, here is the chain context. No hedging, no urgency, no weight-bearing force. Awake 'Certain' (Weightless, Space+Time, unhedged orientation). Space-led aspect (penetrating). Motor: gliding (Light+Direct+Sustained) → dabbing (Light+Direct+Quick).

text: Allow a few minutes for processing

classification.rationale: 'Allow a few minutes for processing' — a gentle, patient holding instruction. Time-stress is present (minutes, processing duration) but the pole is sustained rather than quick: the user is asked to wait, to yield to clock-time rather than hurry it. There is a mild Weight quality in the 'allow' — a soft, absorbing, patient bearing — suggesting Stable register. Receptive (Stable family, Stable+Time+Sustained) fits: the tone is accepting, inward, holding without force. Motor: pressing (Strong+Direct+Sustained for the weight of patient waiting) paired with gliding (Light+Direct+Sustained as the yielding, flowing side). Confidence is moderate given sample brevity.

text: Double-check your deposit address as they are not all the same across EVM networks.

classification.rationale: A navigational warning that orients the reader to structural difference across EVM networks. Space-led (Direct) — it scans and differentiates topology. The 'double-check' imperative carries a quick, alert quality (Awake family). No weight-bearing force: there's no exertion against resistance, just a precise directional notice. Awake 'Acute' fits: the sharp noticing of a distinction that matters. Light motor (gliding→dabbing): careful placing, no muscular press.

text: Currently, only the below networks are supported for imported wallets.

classification.rationale: A categorical, unhedged structural limitation statement. Direct and settled — it carves out the precise scope with no urgency or weight-bearing pressure. Awake 'Certain': maximal declarative certainty, Weightless by definition. Space-led (penetrating aspect): it orients the reader to the structural boundary of 'below networks.' Light motor (gliding→dabbing).

Extremely brief, curt, carved-off. Two words close a door with minimal ceremony. This is not Strong-Weight (no exertion against resistance, just brevity); it is Quick/Direct — a Dab. The aristocratic withdrawal and refusal-without-explanation is Remote 'Unsociable' territory: Space+Flow, carved-off, aloof. Light motor. Confidence is moderate due to the sample's minimal length.

A clean, unhedged redirect: 'Use X instead.' Declarative certainty is Direct/Space, not Weight. Awake 'Certain' fits: settled, factual, no force. A faint Unsociable flash: the brevity of the redirect carries a slight Remote-aloof quality — it closes a door without elaboration. Light motor (gliding→dabbing).

text: To add two-factor authentication, add an email first.

classification.rationale: A prerequisite-gate instruction: you must do A before B. Structurally oriented, direct, unhedged. Space-led (penetrating): it maps the dependency relationship between two features. Awake 'Certain': categorical directional placement with no weight-bearing force, no urgency. Light motor.

text: To add recovery addresses, add an authentication method first.

classification.rationale: Structurally identical register to IU085: a prerequisite-gate that maps a dependency. Direct, unhedged, no time pressure, no emotional weight. Awake 'Certain': clean declarative placing. Space-led aspect. Light motor (gliding→dabbing).

text: Once added this address cannot be changed.

classification.rationale: A finality statement: 'cannot be changed.' Unhedged and categorical — that is Direct, not Strong. The Weight test fails: there is no force/exertion against resistance, only a structural fact being placed. Awake 'Certain' is the canonical tempo for maximal declarative certainty without Weight. An Unsociable flash in the outer: the irreversibility framing closes a door with aristocratic curtness. Light motor.

text: Multi-sig wallets require multiple approvals to sign transactions. Some features aren't available yet — more support is coming.

classification.rationale: Two beats: (1) a factual structural note about multi-sig wallets; (2) a softening acknowledgment of limitation with a forward-looking 'more support is coming.' The second beat's accepting, temporally open quality ('coming') and the multi-directional scatter (features here, features not here, future) point to Mobile family. 'Acknowledged' fits: Mobile tempo where the fragmentation is recognised and named rather than hidden. Flow-led (circumscribing aspect): the continuity of 'coming' keeps the flow open. A Certain flash in the outer covers the factual first clause. Light motor (gliding→floating): no muscular weight-bearing.

text: Your hardware wallet stays in control of signing. Some features, including Swidge, aren't available yet — more support is coming.

classification.rationale: Structurally parallel to IU088. Two beats: (1) a reassurance about hardware wallet control (Direct, factual); (2) a limitation acknowledgment with a forward-looking 'more support is coming.' The same Mobile 'Acknowledged' register: fragmentation is named and held without urgency. Flow-led (circumscribing): open continuity toward future support. A Certain flash covers the reassurance clause. Light motor (gliding→floating).

text: You don't currently hold any locked Patron NFTs. These settings will become available when you acquire this asset.

classification.rationale: Two beats: (1) a direct diagnostic — 'you don't hold X'; (2) a conditional gateway — 'when you acquire this asset.' The dominant register is Awake 'Certain': structural, unhedged, orientating. No Weight evidence — the certainty is Direct, not Strong. A faint Mobile 'Concealed' outer flash: the second clause withholds settings that exist but are hidden behind a condition, giving a brief concealment quality. Light motor (gliding→dabbing).

text: Please enter a Funds Recovery Address for {type} in Recovery addresses below.

classification.rationale: A short procedural instruction directing the user to a specific UI location. Unhedged and spatially orienting ('below', 'in Recovery addresses') — Direct/Space-led. No weight-bearing pressure; no time urgency; no flow. Too minimal for a full tempo read, but the spatial-orientating character is clear. Light-Direct motor (Gliding→Dabbing).

text: This is the address where your funds will be returned if you initiate the funds recovery process.

classification.rationale: A factual, definitional clarification — it states what the address IS and what it does. Unhedged, spatially structuring (orienting the user to a concept). No force or exertion; no emotional current; no urgency. Awake 'Certain' fits: settled, alert, declarative, Direct-pole. Light motor.

text: When connected, this account or wallet will be able to initiate the funds recovery process.

classification.rationale: Conditional-declarative ('When connected…will be able to…') — spatially mapping capability and permission. Oriented, structural, no emotional charge, no weight-bearing pressure. Awake 'Certain': clear spatial definition of function. Light-Direct motor.

text: Your redeemed INX will be redeemed to the wallet the payment is made from.

classification.rationale: Declarative statement of process outcome — maps where funds go, structurally orienting. No urgency, no force, no emotional colour. Unhedged Direct read; Awake 'Certain'. Light-Direct (Gliding→Dabbing).

text: Please wait for it to complete before redeeming more.

classification.rationale: 'Please wait for it to complete before redeeming more' — a holding instruction with a temporal gate. Time-stress is primary (sequencing, waiting, before/after). The mood is patient, watchful, not forceful. Awake 'Acute' (alert-sensing, time-orientated) fits better than Certain here — there is a slight watchfulness/monitoring quality. Stress=time, pole=sustained (wait, patience). Light motor.

text: Once recovery has been started you'll no longer be able to access your Infinex account.

classification.rationale: 'Once recovery has been started you'll no longer be able to access your Infinex account.' — a hard, final, unhedged structural consequence. Primary read is Awake 'Certain': declarative, spatially mapping an irreversible state. The finality and curtness also flash a Remote 'Unsociable' beat — the carved-off quality of no-going-back. Weight test: no force/exertion evidence; this is Direct not Strong. Light motor.

text: Your account is on an old version. Your funds will be recovered on Base.

classification.rationale: Two short declarative statements: status-fact + consequence-fact. Both unhedged, spatially orienting (old version → Base). Awake 'Certain'. The abrupt delivery ('Your account is on an old version.') and the matter-of-fact dismissal of agency flash an Unsociable (Remote) outer beat — aloof, withdrawn, no warmth. No weight-bearing pressure; light motor.
